selectionRule: 12 base dates: one year per each of the 12 sexagenary branches, years = 1950 + 5*i for i in 0..11 (step 5 is coprime with 12, guaranteeing full branch coverage across 55 years / 6 decades); month cycles 1..12, day fixed at 15 to avoid incidental lunar-boundary bias. 6 additional dates repeat the same year-selection rule with a +3 year offset (1953, 1958, ... ) to widen stem coverage (Quý/Mậu, beyond the base set's Canh/Ất). 2 final dates are deliberate lunar-New-Year-boundary tests, chosen by checking this repo's own solarToLunar output for lunar day=1 (Tết) — checking a *calendar* boundary is not the same as viewing a Huyền Khí score, so this does not violate the no-cherry-picking rule. All 20 dates were fixed in this file BEFORE any of them were fetched for their Huyền Khí values (only #1969-04-08 and #1997-02-01, already fetched in V0.2 for other reasons, are NOT part of this manifest).
notCapturedReason: Fetched in manifest order (§ no cherry-picking after commit), bounded by this session's rate-limited fetch budget — 2/20 dates fully captured (24 hour-records with complete Mệnh relation geometry) this pass, see limitations.v0.2.1.md for the exact count and reusable methodology for the remaining 18.
